title: LemonskyRyan's Perfect Minecraft
description: A vanilla+ modpack that aims to better round out the current Minecraft experience
body:
# **Welcome to LemonskyRyan's Perfect Minecraft**
This modpack is heavily based on this video that I made talking about what I think the perfect verion of the game would look like (although there are some extra mods that I added when actually creating this version of the modpack):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/95KJeu6VLgU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## About

> **What is LemonskyRyan's Perfect Minecraft?**

This vanilla+ modpack is my attempt at using mods to create what I think a perfect version of Minecraft would look like, or at least as close to one as possible.

> **What can you expect to see?**

Within the pack you will find all sorts of new biomes, mobs, structures, revamped versions of vanilla structures, and so much more to create an all new, refreshing Minecraft Experience.

> **Great for multiplayer!**

This pack is also great for multiplayer too, giving you and your friends new opportunities to explore and build together!

## Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>
